description: Chic forest green tote with a metallic silver band and lavender jacquard stripe at the base, accented by a peek of black-and-white plaid at the scalloped neckline. Perfect for market runs or daily essentials.
fabric: Upcycled cotton canvas with metallic ribbon and plaid cotton lining

description: Minimalist cream and natural beige striped shoulder bag in a soft linen-cotton blend. Features a gentle V-neck opening and matching straps for a laid-back, versatile everyday carry.
Playful teal tote showcasing scattered paisley patchwork in jewel-tone blues and greens. The curved top and matching straps make it a fun, artful companion for casual outings.
fabric: Upcycled linen with cotton paisley fabric patches

description: Vibrant sky-blue shoulder bag crafted from repurposed sari fabric, featuring subtle stitched stripes and a chevron neckline trimmed in delicate white floral print. Lightweight and eye-catching.
fabric: Upcycled cotton sari fabric with stitched detailing

description: Whimsical watercolor cat-print tote adorned with colorful feline faces and daisies on a soft pastel backdrop. Sweet V-neck opening and matching handles—ideal for cat lovers young and old.

Vibrant red shoulder tote with a scalloped V-neck trimmed in black geometric print. A decorative gold-and-olive floral jacquard band wraps around the base for a playful pop of pattern—great for errands or evening outings.
fabric: Upcycled red cotton canvas with jacquard ribbon and printed cotton trim

description: Rich plum-colored artisan tote featuring a zigzag neckline edged in black-and-white geometric fabric. The bottom is patched with strips of colorful prints—orange florals, stripes, and abstract motifs—making each bag uniquely eye-catching.
fabric: Upcycled plum cotton-linen blend with assorted printed fabric scraps
